title: Silver's Better Wood Cutting Stone Cutter
description: Craft all of your wood related blocks for cheaper with this datapack!
body:
## Context:
This datapack allows player to use the stonecutter to make wood related blocks for cheaper!

since Minecraft makes it that to craft Wood Related blocks with planks, very expensive and very inconsistent with the actual block scale.



### Supported Wood Variants:
- Acacia
- Bamboo
- Birch
- Cherry
- Crimson
- Dark Oak
- Jungle
- Mangrove
- Oak
- Pale Oak
- Spruce
- Warped

### Contents:
- You are able to make wood related blocks for cheaper!
- You can use stripped logs!

- ~~Update this till version 1.16~~
